title: Replace hex pub_id validation in relay/src/ws.rs with validate_did_key()
description:
Update the GROUP_ADD handler in ws.rs to validate did:key format instead of hex.

What: Replace hard-coded hex validation with validate_did_key() call at the wire boundary.

Algorithm:
1. Read relay/src/ws.rs around lines 1100-1150 to find the exact hex validation block
2. Find: if params.member_pub_id.len() != 64 || !params.member_pub_id.chars().all(...) style check
3. Replace with: agora_core::identity::validate_did_key(&params.member_pub_id).map_err(|_| rpc_error(INVALID_PARAMS, "invalid pub_id format"))?
4. Add import: use agora_core::identity::validate_did_key; at top of ws.rs
5. Also search for any other pub_id format validation in ws.rs (grep for 'hex', 'hexdigit', 'pub_id.len()') and update them too

Defensive programming:
- This is an untrusted wire boundary — validate before any DB or delivery operation
- Error message must not leak internal format details ('invalid pub_id format' is sufficient)
- Case-sensitive: do not case-fold the did:key string

Agent team: standard (R + I + T)

Tests (integration):
- ws.rs GROUP_ADD with valid did:key format accepted (mock or unit test the validation path)
- ws.rs GROUP_ADD with old 64-hex-char format rejected
- ws.rs GROUP_ADD with empty string rejected
- ws.rs GROUP_ADD with random garbage rejected
acceptance_criteria: cargo check -p agora-relay clean; grep -n 'hexdigit\|pub_id.len()' relay/src/ws.rs returns 0 matches (old validation gone)
